description: Style NoteSuper soft vintage leather and a variety of hues to choose from, wallets from fossil are the way to go for a look that chic and versatile effortlessly. Spice up your outfit with these funky yet conventional wallets and get ready to be on top of your game!Product DetailsRaspberry three-fold wallet with a zipped pocket, flap with a press button closure, has one main compartment, eight card holders with two insert pockets, an inner zipped pocket with four card holders on one side and an id card holder on the other side, a buttoned pocket on the front with branding on a metallic badge and stitch detailingMaterial and CareVintage leatherWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDimensions: 10 cm x 13 cm
